title: The Rebel Alliance—Ships of the Fleet

'''''The Rebel Alliance—Ships of the Fleet''''' is an 8-page pop-up book about the ships and fighters of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The page count is deceptive, as it has no less than five fold-outs. In addition to pop-up images, it contains pictures, drawn images, diagrams, technical specifications, and text.

==Publisher's summary==
''Jam-packed with action flaps and spectacular pop-ups, ''The Rebel Alliance--Ships of the Fleet'' takes readers behind the scenes of the Alliance's most guarded military secrets to reveal the ingenious technology of the Rebel fleet.''

''Emperor Palpatine is eager to use his limitless armies and powerful war fleets to extend the reach of his Galactic Empire. But Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and the other members of the Rebel Alliance are determined to stop the evil Emperor. From the many planets of the Alliance, a technologically advanced fleet of ships and vehicles has been assembled to defeat the Empire and restore freedom to the galaxy. From speedy X-wing and Y-wing starfighters to capital combat starships and star cruisers, take an up-close look at the amazing ships of the Rebel Fleet.''

==Contents==
''The Rebel Alliance: Ships of the Fleet'' is a reference book with pop-up cutouts of the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' films: the [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]], [[BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]], [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95]], and the [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeder]]. The book also profiles warships like the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]], [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigtate]], and [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]].
